nasb.text: For the land is full of adulterers; For the land mourns because of the curse. The pastures of the wilderness have dried up. Their course also is evil And their might is not right.

esv.text: For the land is full of adulterers; because of the curse the land mourns, and the pastures of the wilderness are dried up. Their course is evil, and their might is not right.

cnv.text: 因為這地滿了行淫的人； 因受咒詛，地就悲哀， 曠野的草場都枯乾了； 他們走的路是邪惡的， 他們的權力誤用了。

ccb.text: 这里到处是拜偶像的人， 他们行为邪恶，滥用权力。 大地因受咒诅而悲哀， 旷野的草场都枯干了。
